texts: Reworked the deployment panel when editing team builds and added the Easy Deployment Menu.
Changed the team code text area to automatically select the entire code when clicking while editing, to make it more convenient to paste team codes from the game.
Added profile pictures to the Reviewers tab.
Changed the layout of the user status on the sidebar to better handle longer usernames.
Added an option to remove an uploaded profile picture.
Removed the automatic page refresh when updating parts of the user's profile. Details are now updated without needing the refresh.
Fixed some issues with the deployment panel not working for MD Plans when using the spec build recommendation mode.
